title: Grilled Beef Empanadas with Chimichurri
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, filled with grilled beef and served with a tangy Argentinean-style chimichurri sauce. This recipe combines the flavors of Argentina with the richness of beef.
instructions: Divide empanada dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of beef mixture onto one half of each circle.
Brush edges with water and fold dough in half to form a half-circle.
Press edges to seal and use a fork to crimp.
Grill empanadas for 2-3 minutes per side or until golden brown.
Serve with chimichurri sauce for dipping.
